title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
